# Aximo

> Aximo is an advisory and execution firm based in Nairobi, Kenya, that takes companies and investors from decision to result in East Africa. One relationship, one process, one standard, and written proof that the work delivered what it promised.

Aximo coordinates seven disciplines ("engines") through a single accountable client relationship, so a client deals with one firm instead of assembling and managing lawyers, accountants, recruiters, banks, and agencies separately. Aximo's own team leads the marketing and brand practice; the other disciplines are delivered through a vetted network of established professional firms working under Aximo's process, standard, and accountability.

## Contact
- Email: hello@aximohub.com
- Phone and WhatsApp: +254 716 688 988
- Location: Nairobi, Kenya
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/aximohub
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/aximohub
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/aximohub
- X: https://x.com/aximohub

## The seven engines
- Marketing and brand growth: brand strategy and positioning, go-to-market and launch planning, digital marketing, content, PR, and market research.
- Market entry and expansion: feasibility, entity structuring, licensing and regulatory navigation, banking setup, partner identification, and first-90-days support.
- Legal and compliance: entity formation, commercial contracts, shareholder and investment agreements, intellectual property, employment law, and sector licensing.
- Finance and investment readiness: financial modelling, cash flow, management reporting, tax planning, due diligence, and introductions to capital.
- Strategy and operations: operating model design, expansion roadmaps, process documentation, and governance.
- People and culture: hiring strategy, employment contracts, HR policy, payroll and statutory compliance, and work permits.
- Technology and digital infrastructure: systems selection and implementation, automation, cybersecurity foundations, and management dashboards.

## Who Aximo serves
- Foreign companies entering Kenya or using it as an East Africa hub.
- Investors (institutional, funds, family offices, diaspora) deploying capital into the region.
- Established East African businesses expanding or preparing to raise capital.
- Selected high-growth enterprises, through fixed-price marketing-led programmes.

## How an engagement works (five steps)
1. Briefing: a structured conversation about the objective, timeline, and decision. Response within one working day.
2. Diagnosis and matching: a written recommendation of the disciplines and specialists. The client decides.
3. Working session: a session with the matched expert, followed by a written brief within 48 hours.
4. The engagement: scope, milestones, timeline, and fee agreed in writing before work begins.
5. Outcome report: a written close describing what changed and what the next 90 days should focus on. Follow-through continues for 30 days after close.

## Common questions
- What does Aximo do? An advisory and execution firm in Nairobi that takes companies and investors from decision to result in East Africa, coordinating marketing, market entry, legal, finance, strategy, people, and technology under one accountable relationship.
- Where is Aximo based? Nairobi, Kenya, serving East Africa.
- How do I contact Aximo? Email hello@aximohub.com or call/WhatsApp +254 716 688 988.
